post.message: A @ts-expect-error suppression was added in packages/vite/scripts/api-extractor.ts. The checker was silenced rather than the underlying diagnostic resolved; if the PR claims a fix, the suppressed warning may be the defect shipping with its alarm turned off. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix ("Fixes #11029").
post.evidence: // @ts-expect-error TS requires to use the const enum, which is not available as the named export in tsx
